query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `patients` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `fullName` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `phone` varchar(20) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  `address` text,
  `age` int,
  `gender` enum('male','female') NOT NULL,
  `email` varchar(320),
  `isActive` boolean DEFAULT true NOT NULL,
  `lastLoginAt` timestamp NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `patients_phone_idx` (`phone`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `patientOtps` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `phone` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `code` varchar(6) NOT NULL,
  `expiresAt` timestamp NOT NULL,
  `isUsed` boolean DEFAULT false NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `patientOtps_phone_idx` (`phone`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `patientResults` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `patientId` int NOT NULL,
  `resultType` enum('lab','radiology','report') NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `fileUrl` varchar(500),
  `doctorName` varchar(255),
  `resultDate` timestamp NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','ready','delivered') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `patientResults_patient_idx` (`patientId`)
);

  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `patientOtps` (

  `resultDate` timestamp NULL,
  `status` enum('pending','ready','delivered') DEFAULT 'pending' NOT NULL,

  INDEX `patientResults_patient_idx` (`patientId`)
